Accessible by parking at Houghton High School, then hiking or biking Isle Royale Loop to Superior Loop.

Accessible by parking at Houghton High School, then hiking or biking Isle Royale Loop to Superior Loop. An unmapped trail off the Superior Loop walks past 2-3 apple trees. The apple trees are on Houghton High School property.
On Frederick across from the Gundlach building, on the edge of mining history. The bus barn across from the high school still shows signs of train tracks beneath the thresholds of the bus/train bays.

3-4 wild apple trees along the roadside up to the split with Bridge St. Maybe 1 or 2 are directly reachable by hand, the others are down the slope of the ravine. An apple picker is necessary to reach.
Crabapple trees in a city park of Houghton. Picked 14 quarts in about 20 minutes. Awesome tart juice. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
